meaning: adj.蜿ｯ闔ｷ蜿也噪,蜿ｯ謖ｽ謨醍噪
examples: This memory would be searchable, retrievable, and shareable.
The rest are things like photos and phone calls which are less easily retrievable and usable.
With a public cloud, data may be stored in unknown locations and may not be easily retrievable.
It also allows vendors to offer information, goods and services in a format retrievable with e-speak.
Making sure health information that is stored in one IT system can be retrievable by others.
